zh.Ford, Glendale, Northumberland, England: 英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德福特
zh.Edlingham, Northumberland, England: 英國諾圖波藍德艾德林加姆
zh.Northumberland, England, United Kingdom: 英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Heron I於1304年11月出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德福特時，他的父親Roger de Héron45歲，母親Elizabeth de Swinburne35歲。他於1328年與Isabel de Grey在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1379年12月21日在英國諾圖波藍德福特享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Heron I于1304年11月出生在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德福特时，他的父亲Roger de Héron45岁，母亲Elizabeth de Swinburne35岁。他于1328年与Isabel de Grey在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1379年12月21日在英国諾圖波藍德福特享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: Heron
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Herron  .
French (Héron): nickname for a tall, thin person, thought to resemble a heron (Old French hairon).

variants.name: Herron
meanings: English: habitational name from Harome (North Yorkshire), from Old English (æt thǣm) hārum ‘at the (gray) stones’, dative plural of hār ‘gray, stone’.

English and Scottish: nickname probably for a tall, thin man with long legs, from Old French hairon ‘heron’, Anglo-Norman French heron, Middle English heiroun, heyron, herne, heron. Compare Hearn and Heron .
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from (Le) Héron in France (Seine-Maritime).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When William Heron I was born in November 1304, in Ford, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, his father, Roger de Héron, was 45 and his mother, Elizabeth de Swinburne, was 35. He married Isabel de Grey in 1328, in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 21 December 1379, in Ford, Northumberland, England, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Heron I est né en novembre 1304, à Ford, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger de Héron, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Swinburne, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Isabel de Grey en 1328, à Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 21 décembre 1379, à Ford, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Heron I im November 1304 in Ford, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger de Héron 45 und seine Mutter Elizabeth de Swinburne 35. Er hat 1328 in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom Isabel de Grey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 21. Dezember 1379 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Ford, Northumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Heron I è nato il nel novembre 1304 nel Ford, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Roger de Héron, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth de Swinburne, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Isabel de Grey nel 1328, nel Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 21 dicembre 1379, nel Ford, Northumberland, England, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Heron Iが1304年11月にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドフォードで生まれた時，父Roger de Héronは45歳，母Elizabeth de Swinburneは35歳であった。1328年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドでIsabel de Greyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1379年12月21日にイギリスノースウンバーランドフォードで75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Heron I(이)가 1304년 11월 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 포드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger de Héron(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth de Swinburne(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1328년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드에서 Isabel de Grey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1379년 12월 21일 영국 노르스벌랜드 포드에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Heron I nasceu em novembro de 1304, em Ford, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Roger de Héron, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Swinburne, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel de Grey em 1328, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 21 de dezembro de 1379, em Ford, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Heron I родился ноябрь 1304 г. в местности форд, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Roger de Héron было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Swinburne, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel de Grey в 1328 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 21 декабря 1379 г. в местности форд, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Heron I nació en noviembre de 1304, en Ford, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Roger de Héron, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Swinburne, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Isabel de Grey en 1328, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 21 de diciembre de 1379, en Ford, Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 75 años.
